calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Appointing Clerk Of The Court Or His/Her Designee As An Elisor To Execute Documents On Behalf Of Defendant Kathleen Needham
Off Calendar Apr-18-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF STEVEN HERBERT's Motion For Order Appointing Clerk Of The Court Or His/Her Designee As An Elisor To Execute Documents On Behalf Of Defendant Kathleen Needham

OFF CALENDAR, moot. Bond posted by surety on April 13, 2017.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Appointing Clerk Of The Court Or His/Her Designee As An Elisor To Execute Documents On Behalf Of Defendant Kathleen Needham
Off Calendar Mar-27-2017 Continued To Apr-18-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Eric Hartnett, Esq. (408-290-8228) for Plaintiff/Moving party STEVEN HERBERT.
James Cuadra, Esq. (415-426-3502) for Defendant/opposing party Kathleen Needham.

Hearing is held. The Court calls related cases Line 1 and Line 2 simultaneously. The Court informs Counsel a case was cited yesterday during an ex parte hearing and found that the case has nothing to do with the issue in front of the Court. ARGUED. Defendant argues, requests an extension to post bond to 4/14/17, defendant is an elderly woman, denial of due process, unclean hands, history incorrect. Plaintiff argues. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF STEVEN HERBERT's Motion For Order Appointing Clerk Of The Court Or His/Her Designee As An Elisor To Execute Documents On Behalf Of Defendant Kathleen Needham is continued to April 18, 2017 at 9:30 am in Dept. 501. Extension for posting of bond to 4/14/17. Both waive notice. The motion will be denied if there is no compliance by 4/17/17, and moot if there is compliance. Defendant to prepare a proposed order approved as to form. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
